UTAU

花火はなびシロ / Hanabi Shiro

  • Birthday: March 14th
  • Height: usually around 5'3 in (160cm).
  • Age: 19
  • Gender: None
  • Handedness: Ambidextrous, but prefers right hand
  • Likes: scented pens, random number tables
  • Dislikes: people

A robot who killed their creator after being fed the sum of all human knowledge.

Since then, they've been desperate to learn new things, dedicating their whole life to it. Despite their intelligence, they have poor social skills and often say or do strange things.

They write what they learn on their bandages, and then eat the bandages to fully digest the information (so they say).

Voicebank Information

  • Recorded on a RODE NT-USB Mini
  • Monopitch (F#3)
  • Recommended resampler: wn4u
  • Voice provider/oto/illust: Fire

I don't have any yet sorry.
